identity.name: FISAM Academy Palermo
identity.tone: Disciplined, Powerful, Traditional yet Modern, Community-Focused

usage.gradients: NONE. Solid flat colors only. Use subtle radial-gradient overlays for ambient lighting effects if needed.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Use gap-6 or gap-8 between major sections.
layout_strategy.mobile_first: Stack everything on mobile. Use hidden/block utilities to swap complexity.

buttons.primary: bg-[#F5A623] text-black hover:bg-[#E0961F] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm px-6 py-3 transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/20 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-sm px-6 py-3 backdrop-blur-sm

cards.base: bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 rounded-md p-6 shadow-xl
cards.lesson_card: relative overflow-hidden bg-[#121212] border-l-4 border-[#F5A623] p-5 hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] transition-colors group
cards.feedback_card: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 p-4 rounded-md flex flex-col gap-3

inputs.base: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/20 focus:border-[#F5A623] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#F5A623] text-white rounded-sm h-12 px-4 placeholder:text-white/30

navigation.desktop: Sidebar fixed left w-64 bg-[#0A0A0A] border-r border-white/10
navigation.mobile: Bottom fixed bar bg-[#0A0A0A]/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-white/10 z-50

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react'. For martial arts specific actions (punch, kick), try to find abstract metaphors or use generic activity icons.

universal_guidelines: NO PURPLE/TEAL. Strictly Black, White, Gold/Orange.
Mobile-First: Touch targets must be at least 44px.
Images: Use grayscale or high-contrast filters to match the dark theme.
Feedback Private Flag: Use a Lock icon (LockClosed) in Red or Orange to signify privacy.
Notifications: Use a bell icon with a red dot badge.
Data-Test-ID: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind Theme: Override `tailwind.config.js` with the specific colors provided.
2. Fonts: Add the Google Fonts import to `index.css`.
3. Auth Page: Use the Logo prominently. Background image should be one of the hero images with a heavy black overlay (opacity 80%).
4. Dashboard: Create separate layouts for Instructor (Admin view) and Student (User view).
5. Lesson Creation: Use a clear form with Date/Time pickers (Shadcn Calendar).
6. Feedback: Implement the photo upload UI carefully. Limit 5 photos. Show thumbnails.
7. Private Feedback: Ensure the 'Private' toggle is clear in the UI.
8. Toast Notifications: Use `sonner` for all success/error messages.
